2606.13111.title: MÖVE: A Holistic LLM Benchmark for the German Public Sector
2606.13111.paper_summary: We present MÖVE (Modelle für die Öffentliche Verwaltung Evaluieren), a holistic benchmark for evaluating large language models (LLMs) in the context of the German public sector. While LLMs are increasingly adopted in public administration, model selection remains largely ad hoc, and existing benchmarks offer limited guidance: they are predominantly English-centric, US-centric in content, and focus exclusively on task performance. MÖVE addresses these gaps by evaluating 39 models across two complementary dimensions. Performance criteria cover summarization, question answering, and topic extraction. Governance criteria assess hallucination tendencies, energy consumption, provider transparency, and alignment with German constitutional values and knowledge about positions by German political parties. In total, we utilize ten German-language datasets, including gold- and silverstandard datasets that we constructed to reflect public-administration domains. We employ a multi-metric evaluation strategy combining classical NLP metrics, embedding-based methods, and LLM-as-a-judge approaches. Our results show that no single model dominates across all criteria: top performers differ between tasks, and model size alone is a poor predictor of quality. We further evaluate the benchmark itself, analyzing its statistical precision, LLM judge reliability, the impact of our private datasets on model rankings, the sensitivity of our results to prompt formulation, and the validity of our energy consumption estimates. MÖVE is designed as a living benchmark under active development; results are publicly available at https://moeve.bundesdruckerei.de/.
2606.13111.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 MÖVE（Modelle für die Öffentliche Verwaltung Evaluieren），這是一個全面的基準，用於評估大型語言模型（LLMs）在德國公共部門的應用。雖然 LLMs 在公共行政中越來越受到採用，但模型選擇仍然主要是隨意的，現有的基準提供的指導有限：它們主要以英語為中心，內容以美國為中心，並且僅專注於任務表現。MÖVE 通過在兩個互補維度上評估 39 個模型來解決這些缺口。性能標準涵蓋摘要、問題回答和主題提取。治理標準評估幻覺傾向、能源消耗、提供者透明度以及與德國憲法價值觀和德國政黨立場的知識的對齊程度。總體而言，我們利用了十個德語數據集，包括我們構建的金標準和銀標準數據集，以反映公共行政領域。我們採用了一種多指標評估策略，結合了傳統的 NLP 指標、基於嵌入的方法和 LLM 作為評判者的方法。我們的結果顯示，沒有單一模型在所有標準上都占據主導地位：最佳表現者在任務之間有所不同，僅僅依賴模型大小並不是質量的良好預測指標。我們進一步評估了基準本身，分析了其統計精確性、LLM 評判者的可靠性、我們的私有數據集對模型排名的影響、我們結果對提示表述的敏感性以及我們能源消耗估算的有效性。MÖVE 被設計為一個持續發展的活基準；結果可在 https://moeve.bundesdruckerei.de/ 上公開獲得。
2606.13111.author: Camilla Dalerci et.al.
2606.13111.authors: Camilla Dalerci, Thilo Michael, Robin Schaefer, Daniel Weinland
